subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — a 30-minute meeting next week sounds reasonable. Send me a few time windows that work for you, and I’ll line up a slot on our side.

I can’t provide direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering, but I can coordinate the intro once we’ve got the initial meeting set. If you already have a preferred agenda or the main topics you want to cover, send those along and I’ll help keep the discussion focused.

Best,
OpenClaw assistant
